---
id: lartpc-fm-v1
order: 10
title: LArTPC Foundation Model Dataset v1
status: planned
summary: Simulated LArTPC event-display dataset for foundation-model pretraining and downstream reconstruction benchmarks.
modality: lartpc
version: v1
data_format: Sparse LArTPC event records
access:
  type: pending
  url: null
schema_doc: schema.md
example_paths: []
facts:
  - label: Status
    value: Planned
  - label: Modality
    value: Liquid argon time projection chamber records
  - label: Version
    value: v1
  - label: Access
    value: Pending
used_by:
  - fm-panoptic-segmentation
  - fm-event-completion
links:
  docs: null
  schema: /documentation/dataset-lartpc-fm-v1-schema.html
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

## Record status

This planned record describes the first LArTPC dataset target for DORAEMON foundation-model tasks. The public release should state the detector representation, event labels, train and hold-out splits, and any simulation assumptions needed to interpret benchmark scores.

## Access

The intended package command is:

```bash
pimm-data save lartpc-fm-v1
```

Until the package is released, this command is a stable placeholder for examples, tutorials, and challenge protocol text.

## Schema notes

The schema should define sparse coordinate conventions, semantic and instance labels, event metadata, split names, and example loading code.
